patches.value: DonPAPI 的隔离安装、当前参数清单和本地结果界面参考；默认不在命令行传递密码、哈希、密钥或远程目标。
DonPAPI reference for isolated installation, current argument discovery, and local result viewing without passing passwords, hashes, keys, or remote targets on the command line by default.

name.en: Install in Isolation and Show the Version

description.zh: 使用 Pipx 隔离安装当前发布版并查看顶层帮助，先确认版本、输出目录和可用子命令。
description.en: Install the current release through Pipx isolation and inspect top-level help before confirming the version, output directory, and available subcommands.

name.zh: 查看 collect 参数而不执行

description.zh: 只读取当前版本的认证、目标、Collector 和并发参数，不提供凭据、哈希、域或目标，也不发起收集。
description.en: Read authentication, target, collector, and concurrency arguments for the installed version without supplying credentials, hashes, domains, or targets and without starting collection.

name.zh: 查看本地 GUI 参数

description.zh: 查看本地结果界面的监听与数据库参数；实际启动时仅绑定回环地址，并在测试后删除实验数据库和导出工件。
description.en: Inspect listener and database arguments for the local result UI, binding only to loopback when launched and deleting lab databases and exports afterward.

patches.value: Mimikatz 离线实验与检测参考
Mimikatz Offline Lab and Detection Reference
Mimikatz 版本确认、当前票据清单、合成离线内存转储解析和 Windows 检测日志关联参考，不包含持久化或票据伪造默认步骤。
Mimikatz reference for version checks, current ticket inventory, synthetic offline memory-dump parsing, and Windows detection-log correlation without persistence or ticket-forgery defaults.

description.zh: 在隔离 Windows 实验机记录二进制版本与架构后退出，不请求调试权限或访问凭据材料。
description.en: Record the binary version and architecture on an isolated Windows lab host and exit without requesting debug privilege or accessing credential material.

name.en: List Tickets in the Current Session

description.zh: 只列出当前实验会话可见的 Kerberos 票据元数据，不导出、导入、伪造或传递票据。
description.en: List Kerberos ticket metadata visible to the current lab session without exporting, importing, forging, or passing tickets.

name.zh: 解析合成离线 LSASS 转储
name.en: Parse a Synthetic Offline LSASS Dump

description.zh: 仅解析由一次性实验虚拟机生成并脱敏的离线转储，输出写入受控目录；不得读取生产 LSASS 或真实用户凭据。
description.en: Parse only a redacted offline dump generated by a disposable lab VM and store output in a controlled directory without reading production LSASS or real user credentials.

name.zh: 检查 Defender 检测事件

description.zh: 查询 Defender 威胁检测与处置事件，把时间戳、检测名称和测试样本哈希与实验执行窗口关联。
description.en: Query Defender threat-detection and remediation events and correlate timestamps, detection names, and the lab sample hash with the execution window.

name.zh: 检查 Sysmon 进程证据

description.zh: 筛选 Sysmon 进程创建与 ProcessAccess 事件，关联样本路径、哈希、父进程和对实验转储的访问。
description.en: Filter Sysmon process-creation and ProcessAccess events to correlate sample path, hash, parent process, and access to the synthetic lab dump.

name.zh: 核对 LSA 保护配置

description.zh: 只读检查 LSA Protection 配置并记录缺失值，结合 Credential Guard、系统版本和重启状态判断实际防护。
description.en: Read LSA Protection configuration and record missing values, interpreting effective protection with Credential Guard, operating-system version, and reboot state.
